summary: Acceptance tests written for all 6 Gherkin scenarios plus a handoff validation test. Tests are currently RED — they fail to compile because Handoff.Validate() does not exist yet. The Coder must implement a Validate() method on the Handoff struct in internal/handoff/handoff.go that returns an error when From, To, Status, or Feature fields are empty. Once Validate is implemented, all 7 tests should pass (GREEN).
instructions: Acceptance tests in internal/acceptance/agent_coordination_test.go are RED. They call h.Validate() on handoff.Handoff which does not exist. Implement Validate() error method on the Handoff struct in internal/handoff/handoff.go. It should return an error if From, To, Status, or Feature are empty strings. Follow TDD: write a unit test first in internal/handoff/handoff_test.go for Validate, then implement. Run mutation testing afterward. All tests must be green before marking complete.
